name: Sheet Cake (Bake & Frost 45 Minutes)
recipeInstructions:
Cake: Mix flour and sugar in a bowl. Set aside. In a saucepan, combine oleo, cocoa, and water. Heat until boiling. Pour the hot mixture over the flour and sugar mixture. Beat together buttermilk, eggs, vanilla, salt, and baking soda. Pour into a greased and floured sheet pan. Bake for 20 minutes at 400 degrees Fahrenheit. Immediately start making icing using the same pan. Icing: Heat oleo, cocoa, and buttermilk in a saucepan until slightly thickened. Add powdered sugar, vanilla, and nuts. Spread over hot cake.
